particulars.description: All the freehold property edged red on the plan attached to the instrument known as 14 monk street, abergavenny, NP7 5NP as described in a conveyance dated 4TH december 1961 between william owen williams (1) and peter frederick jones and maureen ann jones (2) and all that freehold property known as 16 monk street, abergavenny, NP7 5NP as described in a conveyance dated 4TH january 1971 between the abergavenny and district farmers marketing association limited (1) and peter frederick jones and maureen ann jones (2).
